ddls:
CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "regular_cost" REAL /* Regular cost of the service */,
  "plan_cost" REAL /* Cost of the service under a promotional plan */,
  "savings_amount" REAL /* Savings amount compared to regular cost */,
  "savings_percentage" REAL /* Savings percentage compared to regular cost */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service category */,
  "service_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each service */,
  "service_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service in minutes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the service */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the service is currently active */,
  "required_equipment" TEXT /* List of equipment required for the service */,
  "required_staff" TEXT /* List of staff roles required for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the service category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, billing, provider) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_records" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service billed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who processed the billing */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the service */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was billed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost charged to the patient */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number for each billing record */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the bill has been paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the billing record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_records_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient record was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the patient record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service associated with the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the promotion is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the promotion */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the promotion was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient giving feedback */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the patient (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the patient */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback is anonymous */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been addressed */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service that was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the update has been reverted */,
  "reverted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reverted the update */,
  "reverted_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_updates_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, billing, provider) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user-role association is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user-role association was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the savings summary record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service associated with the savings */,
  "total_savings" REAL /* Total savings offered across all promotions for the service */,
  "average_savings" REAL /* Average savings percentage across all promotions for the service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the savings summary */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the savings summary record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_savings_summary_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the action was performed by an automated system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)
